plans.title: V1.24 Knowledge ↔ Crates Alignment — normative spec refresh and Local API / KB semantics
plans.notes: Done. Batches A–E complete. QC tri-review: 3× Approve (0 Critical, 0 Warning). QA: clippy clean, all tests pass. 352 lines dead code removed (daemon context/assemble proxy). Work-scope KB isolated and documented. R1/R2 (accept) archived; R3/R4 (defer) remain open.

metadata.description: Refresh normative knowledge specs to match 2026-05-22 crates; align Local API docs with daemon router; resolve context/assemble and work-KB vs World-KB naming.
metadata.next_action: Archive plan per Profile B done-compaction.

batches.name: A — Normative doc refresh
batches.notes: Commit 51852a5. §4 refreshed, boundary routes rebuilt, AGENTS.md aligned.

batches.name: B — Context assemble B2
batches.notes: Commit ddc193a. 352 lines dead code removed. DaemonClient::call_assemble() retired.

batches.name: C — Work KB semantics C2
batches.notes: Commit 7f63bc3. Work-scope docs/comments enforced. New test added.

batches.name: D — Tracker hygiene
batches.notes: Commit 75fdd8d. DF-42, DF-43 added to deferred tracker. V1.24 snapshot added.

batches.name: E — QA + QC
batches.notes: QC tri-review 3× Approve. 0 Critical, 0 Warning. 6 non-blocking suggestions registered as residuals.

plans.title: V1.25 Knowledge ↔ Crates Product Wiring — post-V1.24 hygiene (Theme A)
plans.notes: Theme A only (doc/schema hygiene). Themes B/C/D deferred to future plans. Based on V1.25 compass third-pass audit.

metadata.description: Post-V1.24 hygiene: fix stale schema descriptions, clap help, deferred tracker, cli-spec orchestrate/schedule labels, and Stage-0 vs Moment wording.
metadata.next_action: A0 confirmed (Theme A only). Dispatching @architect for Batch A.

batches.name: A0 — Scope decision
batches.notes: Confirmed Theme A only; B/C/D deferred. PM gate pass 2026-05-22.

batches.name: QA — Verify + QC single-review
batches.notes: clippy + cargo test; single QC reviewer (doc-only).

cross_cutting.title: rand 0.7.3 cannot be upgraded — blocked by wiremock → http-types upstream
cross_cutting.note: Blocked by wiremock → http-types upstream. Removed from V1.6 scope per V1.6 delivery compass decision.
